modules.title: Board Progress
bullets: Board is 20% complete: 5 done, 20 open out of 25 total tickets. Stages: 2 in discovery, 1 in delivery, 5 done; 17 tickets are not in a tracked stage (RESEARCH: 7, NOT STARTED: 4, DESIGN: 3, PRD: 2, Design Handoff: 1).
TP-28 XFN Support: 2/2 done (complete). TP-8 Fincera Infrastructural Setup: 1/1 done (complete).
TP-7 Newsletter Referral Program: 0/1 done, 1 in progress (RESEARCH). TP-31 Fanbasis BNPL: 0/1 done, 1 in progress (RESEARCH).
No Epic: 2/20 done, 18 in progress — bulk of the board sits here with 7 tickets in RESEARCH and 4 NOT STARTED.
